attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
  ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY
,SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT   
 ,SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT 
 ,SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT   
 ,SK_TRX_ID_INT   
 ,AR_TRX_KEY   
 ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY   
 ,BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY 
 ,GL_DT           
 ,BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD   
 ,BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
,ACCT_CLASS_CD         
 ,SALES_ORDER_KEY  
 ,SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
 ,PRDT_INVOICED_QTY  
 ,REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD  
 ,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY 
 ,BK_COMPANY_CD 
 ,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
 ,SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT
,CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE 
 ,GL_POSTED_DT  
 ,PRODUCT_KEY 
 ,BK_DEAL_ID      
 ,MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD
,TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD  
 ,SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT 
 ,ELEMENT_TYPE_CD   
 ,BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT  
 ,BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY 
 ,TRX_SRC_CD    
 ,OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
 ,ATTRIBUTION_CD   
 ,BK_WEB_ORDER_ID   
 ,SS_CD    
 ,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD    
 ,RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT 
 ,RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT 
 ,RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT 
 ,RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT 
 ,BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT 
 ,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD,'UNKNOWN') BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD 
 ,COALESCE(BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,-999) AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT 
 ,COALESCE (BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT,-999)BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT 
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM 
 ,USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER    
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM    
 ,USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
 ,REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME  
 ,POB_TYPE_CD 
 ,COALESCE(REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD
,COALESCE(SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE  
 , DML_TYPE 
 ,COALESCE(REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME
 ,REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_SUB_TRACK_NAME
  , DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
	 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
	 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
	 ,ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
FROM    ( SELECT	  
SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,-999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID , -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID, -999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT,
COALESCE (NAT.AR_TRX_KEY , -7777) AS AR_TRX_KEY,
COALESCE (NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY ,-7777)  AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, 
-999  BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ,
COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE ,DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD, 
COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE ,'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD, 
COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS ,'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD, 
--Performance recommendations
----COALESCE ( NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,        -7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY , 
COALESCE ( NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY ,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY ,        
COALESCE ( NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-7777) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,
-999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE,'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY ,
COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE,'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD, 
COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
 -999  AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,				  
CASE    WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' 
WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN  'DEBIT'  
ELSE  'UNKNOWN' 
END    AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE,
COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD, 
'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD ,
-999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT, 
COALESCE ( DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,
'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID,
-999) AS  BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
-999  AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,			
CASE    
WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME  IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')    
AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'ERP' THEN 'VIP_ERP_ADJ'   
WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  
AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'ERP' THEN 'CSPP_ERP_ADJ'     
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
END    TRX_SRC_CD, 
COALESCE (DIST.ATTRIBUTE2, -999) AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
CASE 
WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE'  
WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN   'ATTRIBUTED' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
END      AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD,
CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID , 'CG' AS SS_CD,
CASE WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'CSPP%' THEN
CASE WHEN EXT_ALL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD ='AS_PSR' 
AND DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('SERVICE','OA AS SERVICE' ) THEN 'AS-S CSPP Program'              
WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SUBSCRIPTION','SUBSCRIPTION') THEN 'CSPP Program'
WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SERVICE','SERVICE') THEN 'TS CSPP Program'
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END
WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'V%' THEN
CASE WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SUBSCRIPTION','SUBSCRIPTION' ) THEN 'VIP Subscription Systematic'
WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SERVICE','SERVICE' ) THEN 'TS Current VIP Programs Systematic'
WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA PRODUCT','PRODUCT' ) THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 END 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
CASE     
WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
ELSE 0 END    AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
CASE     WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
ELSE 0 END  AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT, 
CASE     WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
ELSE 0 END    AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
CASE     WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
ELSE 0 END    AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
CAST(-999 AS INTEGER) AS  BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,				 
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
COALESCE (EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 ,'UNKNOWN' ) AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME, 
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
COALESCE(EXT_ALL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,                                       
COALESCE (CASE   WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE28 
WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13 
END,'UNKNOWN')  POB_TYPE_CD, 
CASE     WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I'     
ELSE 'U' 
END    AS DML_TYPE ,
		COALESCE (
				CASE   
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8 
				END,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME
				,COALESCE (EXT_ALL.Attribute2,'UNKNOWN') as REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_SUB_TRACK_NAME
				,COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
           , coalesce(sub_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ext_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_START_DATE,ext_all.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_END_DATE,ext_all.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
		FROM	  
		    $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL   DIST  
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL  
		    ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_VIP SUB_ALL 
		    ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE1 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4 
		    AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL 
		    ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_VIP  XAH 
		    ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID 
		    AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A'
		              INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
		    ON(COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,
				EXT_ALL.SKU)=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
		    ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID)
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB      
		    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
		    ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = COALESCE( EXT_ALL. CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
				  -9999)  
		    AND SAT.SS_CODE = 'CG') 
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		    ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL 
		    ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = COALESCE (EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,
				 -9999) 
		    AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG')
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
		    ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN   
		    ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  
		    AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE)  
		   --Performance recommendations 
		    LEFT OUTER JOIN  
		    
		    (   
			SELECT	 BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,SALES_ORDER_KEY  
			FROM	 $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER  
			WHERE	 BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IN 
			    (
				SELECT	 ORDER_NUMBER  
				FROM	$$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL)
			    ) NSO 
		    ON( (DIST.ORDER_NUMBER ) = NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT) 
		    ---LEFT OUTER JOIN SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT 
		    ----ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
		    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
		    ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID 
		    AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'CG' 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
		    ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID 
		    AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL 
		    ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY  
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
		    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= (
			SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
			FROM	$$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
			    WHERE	 CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' ) 
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
		WHERE	      EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'ERP' AND DIST .APPLICATION_ID IN
 (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
 IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES')  AND LANG = 'US')
		
		UNION ALL 
		
				SELECT	 
		  SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY,
		COALESCE (DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID,  -999)  AS SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT,
				
		 COALESCE (DIST.AE_HEADER_ID ,   -999 )SK_AE_HEADER_ID_INT,
				
		 COALESCE( DIST.AE_LINE_NUM,  -999)  SK_AE_LINE_NUM_INT,
		        COALESCE( DIST.TRANSACTION_ID,
				-999) AS SK_TRX_ID_INT, 
		                             CAST(-7777 AS INTEGER) AS AR_TRX_KEY,
		        CAST(-7777  AS INTEGER) AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
		                             -999  BILL_TO_CUST_PRTY_KEY ,
		        COALESCE (XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE ,          DATE '3500-01-01') AS  GL_DT,
		        COALESCE (DIST.CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_TRXL_ISO_CURR_CD,
		        COALESCE (NSOB.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE , 'UNK') AS BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD,
		        COALESCE (DIST.ACCOUNT_CLASS , 'UNKNOWN' )AS ACCT_CLASS_CD,
		                             CAST(-7777 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_ORDER_KEY  ,
		        CAST(-7777 AS INTEGER) AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY , 
		                             -999 AS PRDT_INVOICED_QTY,
		        COALESCE (DIST.DIST_TYPE, 'UNKNOWN') AS REV_DISTRI_TYPE_CD,
				
		                             COALESCE(ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
				-995) AS GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY , 
		                             COALESCE (EOUGC.BK_COMPANY_CODE ,
				 'UNK') AS BK_COMPANY_CD,
		                             COALESCE (NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
				-999) AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY ,
		        -999 AS SK_PREVIOUS_TRX_ID_INT,
				
		CASE   
		    WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN 'CREDIT' 
		    WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN  'DEBIT' 
		    ELSE  'UNKNOWN' 
				END    AS CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE, 
		COALESCE(XAH.GL_TRANSFER_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') GL_POSTED_DT,
		        COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS PRODUCT_KEY, 
		                             'UNKNOWN' AS BK_DEAL_ID,
		        'UNKNOWN' AS  MANUAL_REV_TRANSFER_TYPE_CD, 
		                             'UNKNOWN' AS TRANSFER_GROUP_TYPE_CD  ,
		        -999 AS SBSCRPTN_ITEM_CHANGE_ID_INT,
		                             COALESCE ( DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE,
				'UNKNOWN' ) ELEMENT_TYPE_CD, 
		                             COALESCE (DIST.APPLICATION_ID,
				-999) BK_APPLICATION_ID_INT,
		        -999  AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
				
		CASE    
		    WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME  IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')    
		    AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'POS' THEN 'VIP_POS_ADJ'   
		    WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  
		    AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'POS' THEN 'CSPP_POS_ADJ'  
		 ELSE 'UNKNOWN'    
				END    TRX_SRC_CD, 
		COALESCE (DIST.ATTRIBUTE2 , -999) AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
		        CASE 
		    WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE'  
		    WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN   'ATTRIBUTED'   
		              ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
				END      AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD,
		CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(30)) AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
		'CG' AS SS_CD,
		
				CASE
					WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'CSPP%' THEN
				CASE
					WHEN EXT_ALL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD ='AS_PSR' 
			AND DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('SERVICE','OA AS SERVICE' ) THEN 'AS-S CSPP Program' 
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SUBSCRIPTION','SUBSCRIPTION') THEN 'CSPP Program'
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SERVICE','SERVICE') THEN 'TS CSPP Program'
					ELSE 'UNKNOWN'
				END
					WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'V%' THEN
				CASE
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SUBSCRIPTION','SUBSCRIPTION' ) THEN 'VIP Subscription Systematic'
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SERVICE','SERVICE' ) THEN 'TS Current VIP Programs Systematic'
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA PRODUCT','PRODUCT' ) THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16
				END 
					ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
				END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
		
				CASE    
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
				CASE    
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT , 
				CASE    
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
				CASE    
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
		COALESCE (EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
				 -999) AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
		NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,
		NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
		NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
		COALESCE (EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16,
				'UNKNOWN'  ) AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME, 
		 COALESCE(EXT_ALL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
				'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
		COALESCE(EXT_ALL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
				'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
		  COALESCE (
				CASE    
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE28  
		    WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13 
				END,'UNKNOWN')  POB_TYPE_CD, 
				CASE   
					WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I'     
					ELSE 'U' 
				END    AS DML_TYPE ,
		COALESCE (
				CASE   
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8 
				END,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME
				,COALESCE (EXT_ALL.Attribute2,'UNKNOWN') as REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_SUB_TRACK_NAME
						,COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
           , coalesce(sub_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ext_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_START_DATE,ext_all.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_END_DATE,ext_all.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
		FROM	
		    $$STGDB.ST_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_ALL    DIST 
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL  
		    ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_VIP SUB_ALL 
		    ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE1 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4 
		    AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL 
		    ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_VIP  XAH 
		    ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID 
		    AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
		              INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP 
		    ON (COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,
				EXT_ALL.SKU)=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ) 
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
		    ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID) 
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB      
		    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   
		    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN   
		    ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  
		    AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA 
		    ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID 
		    AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL 
		    ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY

		        -999  AS BILL_TO_ERP_CA_LOC_USE_KEY,
				
		CASE    
		    WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME  IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')    
		    AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'XAAS' THEN 'VIP_XAAS_ADJ'   
		    WHEN DIST.APPLICATION_NAME IN ('CISCO SERVICE REBATES','CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')  
		    AND  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'XAAS' THEN 'CSPP_XAAS_ADJ'      
					ELSE 'UNKNOWN'   
				END    TRX_SRC_CD, 
		COALESCE (DIST.ATTRIBUTE2, -999) AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
		   CASE 
		    WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE'  
		    WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN   'ATTRIBUTED' 
		    ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
				END      AS  ATTRIBUTION_CD, 
		              NSOVT.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID AS BK_WEB_ORDER_ID ,
				
		              'CG' AS SS_CD,
		    CASE    
					WHEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'CSPP%'  THEN 
		  CASE     
		    WHEN   DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SUBSCRIPTION',
				'SUBSCRIPTION') THEN 'CSPP PROGRAM'  
		    WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SERVICE',
				'SERVICE') THEN 'TS CSPP PROGRAM' 
		    ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
				END    
		    WHEN  EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 LIKE 'V%'  THEN 
				CASE
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SBP SUBSCRIPTION','SBP SUBSCRIPTION',
				'OA SBP PRODUCT','SBP PRODUCT' ) THEN 'VIP Annuity Systematic'
					WHEN DIST.ELEMENT_TYPE IN ('OA SBP SERVICE','SBP SERVICE','OA SBP TS SERVICE' ) THEN 'TS VIP Annuity Systematic'
					ELSE 'VIP Annuity Systematic'
				END 
					ELSE 'UNKNOWN' 
				END AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD,
				CASE      
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
				CASE      
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='C' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT, 
				CASE      
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN DIST.AMOUNT     
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
				CASE      
					WHEN DIST.DIST_BAL_TYPE='D' THEN CAST((COALESCE(DIST.AMOUNT,0.000000))/CAST(NCCDR_FUNC.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) 
					ELSE 0 
				END    AS RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
		EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE51 AS BK_POS_TRX_ID_INT,
				
		        NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE  BK_FISCAL_CAL_CD   ,
				 
		                             NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  ,
		        NFISMN.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT  BK_FISCAL_MTH_NUM_INT  ,
				
		                             COALESCE (EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE16 ,
				       'UNKNOWN' ) AS REBATE_PROGRAM_NAME,
		                            COALESCE(EXT_ALL.REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
				'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_APPLIED_METHOD_CD,
		                             COALESCE(EXT_ALL.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
				'UNKNOWN') AS SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID,
		                             COALESCE (
				CASE   
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE28  
		                         WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE13  
				END,'UNKNOWN')  POB_TYPE_CD, 
				CASE    
		    WHEN NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I'     
					ELSE 'U' 
				END    AS DML_TYPE ,
		              COALESCE (
				CASE   
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS NULL THEN EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8
					WHEN SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID IS  NOT NULL THEN  SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE8 
				END,'UNKNOWN') AS REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_TRACK_NAME
				,COALESCE (EXT_ALL.Attribute2,'UNKNOWN') as REBATE_PRGRM_BUSINESS_SUB_TRACK_NAME
						,COALESCE (NP.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
           , coalesce(sub_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ext_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_START_DATE,ext_all.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
           , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_END_DATE,ext_all.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
		FROM	   
		      $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_VIP    DIST 
		                INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI SMROL  
		    ON SMROL.SK_TRX_DISTRI_ID_INT = DIST.TRANSACTION_DIST_ID 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_VIP SUB_ALL 
		    ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE1 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4 
		    AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL 
		    ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS_VIP  XAH 
		    ON DIST.AE_HEADER_ID=XAH.AE_HEADER_ID 
		    AND   XAH.BALANCE_TYPE_CODE = 'A' 
		    INNER JOIN ( SELECT NP.ITEM_KEY,NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP , ( SELECT COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,EXT_ALL.SKU) SKU 
	FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_VIP    DIST  
    LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXT_SUB_VIP SUB_ALL 
    ON DIST.ATTRIBUTE1 = SUB_ALL.ATTRIBUTE4 
    AND  SUB_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID=DIST.TRANSACTION_ID 
    INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_REV_EXTRACT_VIP EXT_ALL 
    ON DIST.TRANSACTION_ID=EXT_ALL.TRANSACTION_ID 
	GROUP BY  1  ) SUB_ALL 
	WHERE SKU = BK_PRODUCT_ID
	GROUP BY 1,2 ) NP
		    ON(COALESCE(SUB_ALL.SKU,EXT_ALL.SKU)=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
		              INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_OP_UNIT_GAAP_COMPANY EOUGC 
		    ON(EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = DIST.LEDGER_ID) 
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSOB
		    ON NSOB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY = EOUGC.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX SAT 
		    ON (SAT.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_ID_LINT = COALESCE( EXT_ALL. CUSTOMER_TRX_ID,
				    -9999)  
		    AND SAT.SS_CODE = 'CG') 
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX NAT 
		    ON NAT.AR_TRX_KEY = SAT.AR_TRX_KEY 
		              LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_AR_TRX_LINE SATL 
		    ON (SATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT = COALESCE (EXT_ALL.TRX_LINE_ID,
				  -9999) 
		    AND SATL.SS_CODE = 'CG') 
		              INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL 
		    ON NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = SATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFISMN   
		    ON ( CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) >= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  
		    AND CAST(XAH.ACCOUNTING_DATE AS DATE) <= NFISMN.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE) 
		
		    INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL 
		              ON (NSOL.BK_LINE_REF_NUM = CAST(CAST(EXT_ALL.ORDER_LINE_ID AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))
		    AND NSOL.SS_CODE = 'OPL'
		    AND NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE39 )             
		    LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER NSOVT 
		    ON NSOVT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME 
					  FROM $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT  ENGLA, ( SELECT CCID FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG_XXCFIR_REVENUE_DIST_VIP DIST  GROUP BY 1 ) DIST 
					  WHERE (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
					 GROUP BY 1,2,3 ) ENGLA 
		    ON (ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID = DIST.CCID 
		    AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG') 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI NROL 
		    ON NROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY=SMROL.ROL_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRI_KEY 
		              LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR_FUNC
		    ON (NCCDR_FUNC.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE = BK_FUNCTIONAL_ISO_CURR_CD
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE ='USD'
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.BK_CONVERSION_DATE= (
			SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE 
			FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR 
			    WHERE	 CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y' ) 
		    AND NCCDR_FUNC.SK_CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE = 'Corporate')
		WHERE	      EXT_ALL.ATTRIBUTE21 = 'XAAS' 
			AND EXT_ALL.NUM_ATTRIBUTE51 >0 AND DIST .APPLICATION_ID IN
 (SELECT APPLICATION_ID FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_APPLICATION_AR WHERE UPPER(APPLICATION_NAME) 
 IN ('CISCO PARTNER REBATES', 'CISCO SERVICE REBATES')  AND LANG = 'US')
) A

SELECT rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key
      , sk_trx_distri_id_int
      , sk_ae_header_id_int
      , sk_ae_line_num_int
      , sk_trx_id_int
      , ar_trx_key
      , ar_trx_line_key
      , bill_to_cust_prty_key
      , gl_dt
      , bk_trxl_iso_curr_cd
      , bk_functional_iso_curr_cd
      , acct_class_cd
      , sales_order_key
      , sales_order_line_key
      , prdt_invoiced_qty
      , rev_distri_type_cd
      , general_ledger_acct_key
      , bk_company_cd
      , set_of_books_key
      , sk_previous_trx_id_int
      , credit_debit_type
      , gl_posted_dt
      , product_key
      , bk_deal_id
      , manual_rev_transfer_type_cd
      , transfer_group_type_cd
      , sbscrptn_item_change_id_int
      , element_type_cd
      , bk_application_id_int
      , bill_to_erp_ca_loc_use_key
      , trx_src_cd
      , offer_attribution_id_int
      , attribution_cd
      , bk_web_order_id
      , ss_cd
      , adjustment_type_cd
      , ru_trxl_credit_amt
      , ru_functional_credit_amt
      , ru_trxl_debit_amt
      , ru_functional_debit_amt
      , bk_pos_trx_id_int
      , COALESCE(bk_fiscal_cal_cd, 'UNKNOWN')                    bk_fiscal_cal_cd
      , COALESCE(bk_fiscal_year_num_int, -999)                AS bk_fiscal_year_num_int
      , COALESCE(bk_fiscal_mth_num_int, -999)                    bk_fiscal_mth_num_int
      , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                  AS edw_create_dtm
      , USER                                                  AS edw_create_user
      , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                                  AS edw_update_dtm
      , USER                                                  AS edw_update_user
      , rebate_program_name
      , pob_type_cd
      , COALESCE(subscription_ref_id, 'UNKNOWN')              AS subscription_ref_id
      , COALESCE(rebate_applied_method_cd, 'UNKNOWN')         AS rebate_applied_method_cd
      , 'I'                                                   AS action_code
      , dml_type
      , COALESCE(rebate_prgrm_business_track_name, 'UNKNOWN') AS rebate_prgrm_business_track_name
      , rebate_prgrm_business_sub_track_name
      , DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
	  , DV_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
	  , ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
	  , ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
 FROM (SELECT smrol.rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key
            , COALESCE(dist.transaction_dist_id, -999)                                   AS sk_trx_distri_id_int
            , COALESCE(dist.ae_header_id, -999)                                             sk_ae_header_id_int
            , COALESCE(dist.ae_line_num, -999)                                              sk_ae_line_num_int
            , COALESCE(dist.transaction_id, -999)                                        AS sk_trx_id_int
            , COALESCE(nat.ar_trx_key, -7777)                                            AS ar_trx_key
            , COALESCE(natl.ar_trx_line_key, -7777)                                      AS ar_trx_line_key
            , -999                                                                          bill_to_cust_prty_key
            , COALESCE(xah.accounting_date, DATE '3500-01-01')                           AS gl_dt
            , COALESCE(dist.currency_code, 'UNK')                                        AS bk_trxl_iso_curr_cd
            , COALESCE(nsob.functional_currency_code, 'UNK')                             AS bk_functional_iso_curr_cd
            , COALESCE(dist.account_class, 'UNKNOWN')                                    AS acct_class_cd
            , COALESCE(nso.sales_order_key, -7777)                                       AS sales_order_key
            , COALESCE(nsol.sales_order_line_key, -7777)                                 AS sales_order_line_key
            , -999                                                                       AS prdt_invoiced_qty
            , COALESCE(dist.dist_type, 'UNKNOWN')                                        AS rev_distri_type_cd
            , COALESCE(engla.general_ledger_account_key, -995)                           AS general_ledger_acct_key
            , COALESCE(eougc.bk_company_code, 'UNK')                                     AS bk_company_cd
            , COALESCE(nsob.set_of_books_key, -999)                                         set_of_books_key
            , -999                                                                       AS sk_previous_trx_id_int
            , CASE
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'C' THEN 'CREDIT'
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'D' THEN 'DEBIT'
                  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END                                                     AS credit_debit_type
            , COALESCE(xah.gl_transfer_date, DATE '3500-01-01')                             gl_posted_dt
            , COALESCE(np.item_key, -999)                                                AS product_key
            , 'UNKNOWN'                                                                  AS bk_deal_id
            , 'UNKNOWN'                                                                  AS manual_rev_transfer_type_cd
            , 'UNKNOWN'                                                                  AS transfer_group_type_cd
            , -999                                                                       AS sbscrptn_item_change_id_int
            , COALESCE(dist.element_type, 'UNKNOWN')                                     AS element_type_cd
            , COALESCE(dist.application_id, -999)                                        AS bk_application_id_int
            , -999                                                                       AS bill_to_erp_ca_loc_use_key
            ,'CPI_ERP_ADJ' AS trx_src_cd
            , COALESCE(dist.attribute2, -999)                                            AS offer_attribution_id_int
            , CASE
                  WHEN sub_all.transaction_id IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE'
                  WHEN sub_all.transaction_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'ATTRIBUTED'
                  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END                                                     AS attribution_cd
            , CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(30))                                             AS bk_web_order_id
            , 'CG'                                                                       AS ss_cd
            , CASE
                     WHEN DV_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = 'Daily Rates' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS'
                         THEN 'CPI Systematic Subscription'
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN 'CPI Systematic Service Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' THEN 'CPI Systematic'
 
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND np.business_unit_description = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
                         THEN 'TS CPI Systematic Product Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          np.business_unit_description = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES' THEN 'TS CPI Systematic'
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND np.business_unit_description = 'ADVANCED SERVICES'
                         THEN 'AS-S CPI Systematic Product Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND np.business_unit_description = 'ADVANCED SERVICES'
                         THEN 'AS-S CPI Systematic'
                     ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS adjustment_type_cd
 
            , CASE WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'C' THEN dist.amount ELSE 0 END             AS ru_trxl_credit_amt
            , CASE
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'C' THEN CAST((COALESCE(dist.amount, 0.000000)) /
                                                          CAST(nccdr_func.pl_conversion_rate AS DECIMAL(32, 15)) AS DECIMAL(26, 7))
                  ELSE 0 END                                                             AS ru_functional_credit_amt
            , CASE WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'D' THEN dist.amount ELSE 0 END             AS ru_trxl_debit_amt
            , CASE
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'D' THEN CAST((COALESCE(dist.amount, 0.000000)) /
                                                          CAST(nccdr_func.pl_conversion_rate AS DECIMAL(32, 15)) AS DECIMAL(26, 7))
                  ELSE 0 END                                                             AS ru_functional_debit_amt
            , CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)                                                      AS bk_pos_trx_id_int
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_calendar_code                                                bk_fiscal_cal_cd
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_year_number_int                                              bk_fiscal_year_num_int
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_month_number_int                                             bk_fiscal_mth_num_int
            , COALESCE(ext_all.attribute3, 'UNKNOWN')                                    AS rebate_program_name
			 , COALESCE(ext_all.attribute7, 'UNKNOWN')                                    AS subscription_ref_id
            , COALESCE(ext_all.attribute4, 'UNKNOWN')                                    AS rebate_applied_method_cd
            , 'UNKNOWN'                                                                  AS pob_type_cd
            , CASE WHEN nrol.rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END    AS dml_type
            , ext_all.attribute1                                                         AS rebate_prgrm_business_track_name
            ,COALESCE ( ext_all.attribute2,'UNKNOWN')AS rebate_prgrm_business_sub_track_name
            , COALESCE (NPT.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
            , coalesce(sub_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ext_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
            , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_START_DATE,ext_all.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
            , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_END_DATE,ext_all.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
      FROM $$stgdb.st_cg_xxcfir_revenue_dist_all dist
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.sm_rol_trx_line_gl_distri smrol
                           ON smrol.sk_trx_distri_id_int = dist.transaction_dist_id
                LEFT JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xxcfir_rev_ext_sub_vip sub_all
                          ON dist.attribute1 = sub_all.attribute4
                              AND sub_all.transaction_id = dist.transaction_id
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xxcfir_rev_extract_vip ext_all
                           ON dist.transaction_id = ext_all.transaction_id
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xla_ae_headers_vip xah
                           ON dist.ae_header_id = xah.ae_header_id
                               AND xah.balance_type_code = 'A'
                INNER JOIN $$comrefvwdb.r_products np
                           ON (COALESCE(sub_all.sku,
                                        ext_all.sku) = np.bk_product_id)
                    INNER JOIN $$comrefvwdb.r_products npt

                  WHEN sub_all.transaction_id IS NULL THEN 'STANDALONE'
                  WHEN sub_all.transaction_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'ATTRIBUTED'
                  ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END                                                        AS attribution_cd
            , nsovt.bk_web_order_id                                                         AS bk_web_order_id
            , 'CG'                                                                          AS ss_cd
            , CASE
                     WHEN DV_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME = 'Daily Rates' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS'
                         THEN 'CPI Systematic Subscription'
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' THEN 'CPI Systematic Service Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' THEN 'CPI Systematic'
 
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND np.business_unit_description = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES'
                         THEN 'TS CPI Systematic Product Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          np.business_unit_description = 'TECHNICAL SUPPORT SERVICES' THEN 'TS CPI Systematic'
                     WHEN npt.goods_or_service_type = 'GOODS' AND np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND
                          attribution_cd = 'ATTRIBUTED' AND np.business_unit_description = 'ADVANCED SERVICES'
                         THEN 'AS-S CPI Systematic Product Attribution'
                     WHEN np.goods_or_service_type = 'SERVICE' AND np.business_unit_description = 'ADVANCED SERVICES'
                         THEN 'AS-S CPI Systematic'
                     ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS adjustment_type_cd
            , CASE WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'C' THEN dist.amount ELSE 0 END                AS ru_trxl_credit_amt
            , CASE
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'C' THEN CAST((COALESCE(dist.amount, 0.000000)) /
                                                          CAST(nccdr_func.pl_conversion_rate AS DECIMAL(32, 15)) AS DECIMAL(26, 7))
                  ELSE 0 END                                                                AS ru_functional_credit_amt
            , CASE WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'D' THEN dist.amount ELSE 0 END                AS ru_trxl_debit_amt
            , CASE
                  WHEN dist.dist_bal_type = 'D' THEN CAST((COALESCE(dist.amount, 0.000000)) /
                                                          CAST(nccdr_func.pl_conversion_rate AS DECIMAL(32, 15)) AS DECIMAL(26, 7))
                  ELSE 0 END                                                                AS ru_functional_debit_amt
            , ext_all.num_attribute51                                                       AS bk_pos_trx_id_int
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_calendar_code                                                   bk_fiscal_cal_cd
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_year_number_int                                                 bk_fiscal_year_num_int
            , nfismn.bk_fiscal_month_number_int                                                bk_fiscal_mth_num_int
            , COALESCE(ext_all.attribute3, 'UNKNOWN')                                       AS rebate_program_name
			 , COALESCE(ext_all.attribute7, 'UNKNOWN')                                       AS subscription_ref_id
            , COALESCE(ext_all.rebate_applied_method_cd, 'UNKNOWN')                         AS rebate_applied_method_cd
            , 'UNKNOWN'                                                                     AS pob_type_cd
            , CASE WHEN nrol.rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END       AS dml_type
            , ext_all.attribute1                                                            AS rebate_prgrm_business_track_name
            ,COALESCE ( ext_all.attribute2,'UNKNOWN')AS rebate_prgrm_business_sub_track_name
             , COALESCE (NPT.ITEM_KEY, -999) AS DV_BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
            , coalesce(sub_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,ext_all.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS DV_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME
            , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_START_DATE,ext_all.RULE_START_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_START_DT
            , coalesce(sub_all.RULE_END_DATE,ext_all.RULE_END_DATE,DATE '3500-01-01') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_END_DT
       FROM $$excepdb.ex_cg_xxcfir_revenue_dist_vip dist
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.sm_rol_trx_line_gl_distri smrol
                           ON smrol.sk_trx_distri_id_int = dist.transaction_dist_id
                LEFT JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xxcfir_rev_ext_sub_vip sub_all
                          ON dist.attribute1 = sub_all.attribute4
                              AND sub_all.transaction_id = dist.transaction_id
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xxcfir_rev_extract_vip ext_all
                           ON dist.transaction_id = ext_all.transaction_id
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.el_xla_ae_headers_vip xah
                           ON dist.ae_header_id = xah.ae_header_id
                               AND xah.balance_type_code = 'A'
                INNER JOIN $$comrefvwdb.r_products np
                           ON (COALESCE(sub_all.sku,
                                        ext_all.sku) = np.bk_product_id)
                    INNER JOIN $$comrefvwdb.r_products npt
                           ON  ext_all.sku = npt.bk_product_id
                INNER JOIN $$etlvwdb.ev_op_unit_gaap_company eougc
                           ON (eougc.set_of_books_id_int = dist.ledger_id)
                INNER JOIN $$finlglvwdb.n_set_of_books nsob
                           ON nsob.set_of_books_key = eougc.set_of_books_key
                LEFT JOIN $$etlvwdb.sm_ar_trx sat
                          ON (sat.sk_customer_trx_id_lint = COALESCE(ext_all.customer_trx_id,
                                                                     -9999)
                              AND sat.ss_code = 'CG')
                INNER JOIN $$finlglvwdb.n_ar_trx nat
                           ON nat.ar_trx_key = sat.ar_trx_key
                LEFT JOIN $$etlvwdb.sm_ar_trx_line satl
                          ON (satl.sk_customer_trx_line_id_lint = COALESCE(ext_all.trx_line_id,
                                                                           -9999)
                              AND satl.ss_code = 'CG')
                INNER JOIN $$finlglvwdb.n_ar_trx_line natl
                           ON natl.ar_trx_line_key = satl.ar_trx_line_key
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$comrefvwdb.n_fiscal_month nfismn
                                ON (CAST(xah.accounting_date AS DATE) >= nfismn.fiscal_month_start_date
                                    AND CAST(xah.accounting_date AS DATE) <= nfismn.fiscal_month_end_date)
                INNER JOIN $$slsordvwdb.n_sales_order_line nsol
                           ON (nsol.bk_line_ref_num = CAST(CAST(ext_all.order_line_id AS BIGINT) AS VARCHAR(50))
                               AND nsol.ss_code = 'OPL'
                               AND nsol.sales_order_line_key = ext_all.num_attribute53)
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$slsordvwdb.n_sales_order nsovt
                                ON nsovt.sales_order_key = nsol.sales_order_key
                LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT engla.general_ledger_account_key, engla.code_combination_id, engla.global_name
                                 FROM $$etlvwdb.ev_n_general_ledger_account engla
                                    , (SELECT ccid FROM $$excepdb.ex_cg_xxcfir_revenue_dist_vip dist GROUP BY 1) dist
                                 WHERE (engla.code_combination_id = dist.ccid AND engla.global_name = 'CG')
                                 GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) engla
                                ON (engla.code_combination_id = dist.ccid
                                    AND engla.global_name = 'CG')
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$finlglvwdb.n_rol_trx_line_gl_distri nrol
                                ON nrol.rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key = smrol.rol_trx_line_gl_distri_key
                LEFT OUTER JOIN $$finlglvwdb.n_currency_conv_daily_rate nccdr_func
                                ON (nccdr_func.bk_from_currency_code = bk_functional_iso_curr_cd
                                    AND nccdr_func.bk_to_currency_code = 'USD'
                                    AND nccdr_func.bk_conversion_date = (SELECT fiscal_month_end_date
                                                                         FROM $$comrefvwdb.r_fiscal_month_to_year
                                                                         WHERE current_fiscal_month_flag = 'Y')
                                    AND nccdr_func.sk_conversion_type_code = 'Corporate')
       WHERE ext_all.attribute6 = 'XAAS'
         AND ext_all.num_attribute51> 0
         and dist.application_id IN (SELECT application_id
                               FROM $$etlvwdb.el_fnd_application_ar
                               WHERE UPPER(application_name) IN ('CISCO PARTNER INCENTIVES')
                                 AND lang = 'US'))A
